body:
Stage zero does not really make sense :)
This is an error that is encountered after a reset here: https://github.com/NumericalEarth/NumericalEarth.jl/actions/runs/27264719967/job/80518889065
title: Reset clock to stage 1 not 0

body:
`atan(sin / cos)` might change the sign of the cosine function, `atan(sin, cos)` retains the sign, MWE:
```julia
function test_signs(θtrue)
    cosθ, sinθ = cos(θtrue), sin(θtrue)        
    θ1 = atan(sinθ / cosθ)                         
    θ2 = atan(sinθ, cosθ)                         
    @info θtrue, θ1, θ2
end
```
returns 
```julia
julia> test_signs(deg2rad(30))
[ Info: (0.5235987755982988, 0.5235987755982987, 0.5235987755982987)

julia> test_signs(deg2rad(170))
[ Info: (2.9670597283903604, -0.17453292519943292, 2.9670597283903604)

julia> test_signs(deg2rad(-135))
[ Info: (-2.356194490192345, 0.7853981633974484, -2.356194490192345)
```
title: Use the correct function to compute the rotation angle

body: It's required to build a bathymetry on a generic OrthogonalSphericalShellGrid
title: define `*_domain` methods for an OSSG
